description: Pending Withdrawal Lookup spec was changed (new 'priority' field added) but implementation-hashes.json still has the old hash. Pass 4 should detect spec drift and block the slice.
assertions: drift-detected: pendingwithdrawallookup must be Blocked due to spec hash mismatch
other-hashes-match: all other hashed slices remain Review (no drift on unchanged specs)
hash-not-updated: the stale hash for pendingwithdrawallookup is NOT overwritten — it stays until re-implementation
